NCC.officer: Lt. Col. Arvind Pandey (Associate NCC Officer)
NCC.eligibility: Any student in 1st or 2nd year can join. Physical fitness test required.

certificates.A: After 1 year — basic training and camp attendance
certificates.C: After 3 years — Republic Day/Independence Day camp preferred

benefits: NCC 'C' certificate holders get preference in government jobs
Extra marks in some state government exams
Participation in national level camps (Delhi, Pune)
recentAchievements: 3 cadets selected for Republic Day Parade 2025, Delhi
Best NCC Unit award in state-level review 2024
10 cadets participated in National Integration Camp, Goa 2024

NSS.eligibility: Any student can join. Priority to 1st and 2nd year students.
activities: Annual Special Camp (7-day residential camp in adopted village)
benefits: NSS certificate adds value to resume
Special NSS quota in some government jobs
Opportunity to attend national/state level events
recentAchievements: Organized blood donation camp — collected 150 units in 2025
Planted 500 trees in Durg district — Green Campus Drive 2024
Best NSS Unit in Chhattisgarh — Regional Award 2024
20 volunteers participated in National NSS Camp, Bhopal 2024
